author: m.kalinin
content: i think it's quite important for builder deposit contract as this significantly reduces gatekeeping surface

author: .fjl
content: actually, about your attack case, the contract also requires a minimum deposit of 1 ETH per request. so the actual cost of 3k requests is 3k ETH + fees

author: m.kalinin
content: 3k ETH contributes to the attack budget, not the cost as they can be withdrawn thereafter. although, there will be capital loss on that 3k as it will be locked for quite long period of time
